---
title: "Interactive Workflow Tool"
format: 
  html:
    code-fold: true
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

# ============================================
# CONFIGURATION - EDIT THESE VALUES
# ============================================
SURVEY_PASSWORD <- "workflow2024"  # Change this to your desired password
DIAGRAM_FILE <- "OSworkflow.svg"   # Your SVG diagram filename
```

## Interactive Workflow Diagram

Click on any shape in the diagram below to open the survey panel and record your observations.

```{=html}
<!-- Survey Overlay -->
<div class="survey-overlay" id="survey-overlay" onclick="closeSurvey()"></div>

<!-- Survey Sidebar -->
<div class="survey-sidebar" id="survey-sidebar">
  <button class="close-survey" onclick="closeSurvey()">&times;</button>
  
  <div class="survey-content">
    <h2 id="survey-title">Workflow Survey</h2>
    
    <div class="info-text">
      <strong>Shape:</strong> <span id="shape-info">None selected</span>
    </div>
    
    <div id="previous-entry-display"></div>
    
    <form id="survey-form">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="username">Your Name/ID:</label>
        <input type="text" id="username" required placeholder="Enter your name">
      </div>
      
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="password">Password:</label>
        <input type="password" id="password" required placeholder="Enter password">
        <small>Required for editing entries</small>
      </div>
      
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="Status">Question 1: What is the current level of automation?</label>
        <select id="Status" required>
          <option value="">-- Select --</option>
          <option value="Not Started">Not Started</option>
          <option value="In Progress">In Progress</option>
          <option value="Completed">Completed</option>
          <option value="Not Applicable">Not Applicable</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="Potential">Question 2: What is the potential for Automation?</label>
        <select id="Potential" required>
          <option value="">-- Select --</option>
          <option value="Low">Low</option>
          <option value="Medium">Medium</option>
          <option value="High">High</option>
          <option value="Unknown">Unknown</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="PainPoint">Question 3: How painful is the current process?</label>
        <select id="PainPoint" required>
          <option value="">-- Select --</option>
          <option value="All Good">All Good</option>
          <option value="Room for Improvement">Room for Improvement</option>
          <option value="Painful!">Painful!</option>
          <!-- <option value="Blocked">Blocked</option> -->
        </select>
      </div>
      
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="Concern">Question 4: How concerned are you with modifying this task?</label>
        <select id="Concern" required>
          <option value="">-- Select --</option>
          <option value="No Concern">No Concern</option>
          <option value="Moderate Concern">Moderate Concern</option>
          <option value="Terrified">Terrified</option>
          <!-- <option value="Insufficient">Insufficient</option> -->
        </select>
      </div>
      
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="Proficiency">Question 5: What is your level of proficiency with task automation?</label>
        <select id="Proficiency" required>
          <option value="">-- Select --</option>
          <option value="Very Low">Very Low</option>
          <option value="Low">Low</option>
          <option value="Medium">Medium</option>
          <option value="Medium-Strong">Medium-Strong</option>
          <option value="Strong">Strong</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      
      <button type="submit" class="submit-btn">Submit Response</button>
      <div id="form-message"></div>
    </form>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Diagram Controls -->
<div class="svg-controls">
  <button onclick="zoomIn()">🔍 Zoom In</button>
  <button onclick="zoomOut()">🔍 Zoom Out</button>
  <button onclick="resetView()">⟲ Reset View</button>
  <button onclick="togglePanMode()" id="pan-toggle">🔒 Lock Pan</button>
  <span id="zoom-level">Zoom: 100%</span>
</div>

<!-- SVG Viewer -->
<div id="svg-viewer" class="svg-viewer-container"></div>

<!-- Data Management Section -->
<div class="data-section">
  <h3>Survey Data Management</h3>
  <p>All responses are stored locally in your browser. Download the CSV file and commit it to your GitHub repository.</p>
  <button onclick="downloadCSV()" class="download-btn">📥 Download All Responses (CSV)</button>
  <p class="response-count" id="response-count">Total responses: 0</p>
  <button onclick="clearAllData()" class="clear-btn">🗑️ Clear All Local Data</button>
</div>

<script>
  // ============================================
  // CONFIGURATION
  // ============================================
  const SURVEY_PASSWORD = '`r SURVEY_PASSWORD`';
  const DIAGRAM_PATH = '../output/`r DIAGRAM_FILE`';
  
  // ============================================
  // DATA STORAGE
  // ============================================
  const STORAGE_KEY = 'workflow_survey_responses';
  
  function getResponses() {
    const data = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
    return data ? JSON.parse(data) : [];
  }
  
  function saveResponse(response) {
    const responses = getResponses();
    responses.push(response);
    localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(responses));
    updateResponseCount();
  }
  
  function updateResponseCount() {
    const responses = getResponses();
    document.getElementById('response-count').textContent = `Total responses: ${responses.length}`;
  }
  
  function getMostRecentResponse(shapeId) {
    const responses = getResponses();
    const shapeResponses = responses.filter(r => r.shape_id === shapeId);
    if (shapeResponses.length === 0) return null;
    
    shapeResponses.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.timestamp) - new Date(a.timestamp));
    return shapeResponses[0];
  }
  
  // ============================================
  // SURVEY PANEL FUNCTIONS
  // ============================================
  let currentShapeId = null;
  let currentShapeText = null;
  
  function openSurvey(shapeId, shapeText) {
    currentShapeId = shapeId;
    currentShapeText = shapeText || shapeId;
    
    document.getElementById('survey-sidebar').classList.add('open');
    document.getElementById('survey-overlay').classList.add('visible');
    document.getElementById('shape-info').textContent = currentShapeText;
    
    const previousEntry = getMostRecentResponse(shapeId);
    const previousEntryDiv = document.getElementById('previous-entry-display');
    
    if (previousEntry) {
      previousEntryDiv.innerHTML = `
        <div class="previous-entry">
          <strong>📝 Previous Entry (${new Date(previousEntry.timestamp).toLocaleString()}):</strong><br>
          <small>Submitted by: ${previousEntry.username}</small><br>
          <small>The form below is pre-filled with your previous answers. Make changes and submit to create a new entry.</small>
        </div>
      `;
      
      document.getElementById('Status').value = previousEntry.Status;
      document.getElementById('Potential').value = previousEntry.Potential;
      document.getElementById('PainPoint').value = previousEntry.PainPoint;
      document.getElementById('Concern').value = previousEntry.Concern;
      document.getElementById('Proficiency').value = previousEntry.Proficiency;
    } else {
      previousEntryDiv.innerHTML = `
        <div class="info-text">
          <strong>ℹ️ No previous entries for this shape.</strong>
        </div>
      `;
      document.getElementById('survey-form').reset();
    }
    
    document.getElementById('form-message').innerHTML = '';
  }
  
  function closeSurvey() {
    document.getElementById('survey-sidebar').classList.remove('open');
    document.getElementById('survey-overlay').classList.remove('visible');
    document.getElementById('survey-form').reset();
    document.getElementById('form-message').innerHTML = '';
  }
  
  // ============================================
  // FORM SUBMISSION
  // ============================================
  document.getElementById('survey-form').addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    
    const messageDiv = document.getElementById('form-message');
    const password = document.getElementById('password').value;
    
    if (password !== SURVEY_PASSWORD) {
      messageDiv.innerHTML = '<div class="error-msg">❌ Incorrect password</div>';
      return;
    }
    
    const response = {
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      username: document.getElementById('username').value,
      shape_id: currentShapeId,
      shape_text: currentShapeText,
      Status: document.getElementById('Status').value,
      Potential: document.getElementById('Potential').value,
      PainPoint: document.getElementById('PainPoint').value,
      Concern: document.getElementById('Concern').value,
      Proficiency: document.getElementById('Proficiency').value
    };
    
    saveResponse(response);
    
    messageDiv.innerHTML = '<div class="success-msg">✅ Response saved! Remember to download the CSV and commit to GitHub.</div>';
    
    setTimeout(() => {
      closeSurvey();
    }, 2000);
  });
  
  // ============================================
  // CSV DOWNLOAD
  // ============================================
  function downloadCSV() {
    const responses = getResponses();
    
    if (responses.length === 0) {
      alert('No responses to download yet!');
      return;
    }
    
    const headers = ['timestamp', 'username', 'shape_id', 'shape_text', 'Status', 'Potential', 'PainPoint', 'Concern', 'Proficiency'];
    const csvContent = [
      headers.join(','),
      ...responses.map(r => [
        r.timestamp,
        `"${r.username}"`,
        `"${r.shape_id}"`,
        `"${r.shape_text}"`,
        `"${r.Status}"`,
        `"${r.Potential}"`,
        `"${r.PainPoint}"`,
        `"${r.Concern}"`,
        `"${r.Proficiency}"`
      ].join(','))
    ].join('\n');
    
    const blob = new Blob([csvContent], { type: 'text/csv' });
    const url = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = `workflow_survey_responses_${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.csv`;
    document.body.appendChild(a);
    a.click();
    document.body.removeChild(a);
    window.URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  }
  
  function clearAllData() {
    if (confirm('Are you sure you want to clear all survey data? This cannot be undone!')) {
      localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      updateResponseCount();
      alert('All data cleared!');
    }
  }
  
  // ============================================
  // SVG DIAGRAM WITH PAN/ZOOM
  // ============================================
  (function() {
    var container = document.getElementById('svg-viewer');
    var scale = 1;
    var translateX = 0;
    var translateY = 0;
    var isDragging = false;
    var panEnabled = true;
    var startX, startY;
    var svg;
    
    fetch(DIAGRAM_PATH)
      .then(response => response.text())
      .then(svgText => {
        container.innerHTML = svgText;
        svg = container.querySelector('svg');
        
        if (svg) {
          svg.removeAttribute('width');
          svg.removeAttribute('height');
          
          var viewBox = svg.getAttribute('viewBox');
          if (!viewBox) {
            var bbox = svg.getBBox();
            svg.setAttribute('viewBox', `${bbox.x} ${bbox.y} ${bbox.width} ${bbox.height}`);
          }
          
 
// More aggressive link interception
var links = svg.querySelectorAll('a');
console.log("Found", links.length, "links in SVG");

links.forEach(function(link) {
  var href = link.getAttribute('href') || link.getAttribute('xlink:href');
  console.log("Link href:", href);
  
link.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  e.stopPropagation();
  
  var href = this.getAttribute('href') || this.getAttribute('xlink:href');
  console.log("Clicked link with href:", href);
  
  // Strip diagrams.net URL if present
  if (href && href.includes('#survey:')) {
    var surveyPart = href.substring(href.indexOf('#survey:'));
    console.log("Opening survey for:", surveyPart);
    var parts = surveyPart.replace('#survey:', '').split('|');
    var shapeId = parts[0];
    var shapeText = parts[1] || shapeId;
    openSurvey(shapeId, shapeText);
  } else if (href) {
      console.log("Opening survey for:", href);
      var parts = href.replace('#survey:', '').split('|');
      var shapeId = parts[0];
      var shapeText = parts[1] || shapeId;
      openSurvey(shapeId, shapeText);
    } else if (href) {
      console.log("Opening external link:", href);
      window.open(href, '_blank');
    }
  });
});
          updateTransform();
        }
      })
      .catch(error => {
        container.innerHTML = '<p style="color: red; padding: 20px;">Error loading diagram: ' + error.message + '</p>';
      });
    
    container.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
      if (e.target.tagName === 'A' || e.target.closest('a')) {
        return;
      }
      
      if (panEnabled) {
        isDragging = true;
        startX = e.clientX - translateX;
        startY = e.clientY - translateY;
        e.preventDefault();
      }
    });
    
    document.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
      if (isDragging && panEnabled) {
        translateX = e.clientX - startX;
        translateY = e.clientY - startY;
        updateTransform();
      }
    });
    
    document.addEventListener('mouseup', function(e) {
      isDragging = false;
    });
    
    container.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      var delta = e.deltaY > 0 ? 0.9 : 1.1;
      
      var rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
      var mouseX = e.clientX - rect.left;
      var mouseY = e.clientY - rect.top;
      
      translateX = mouseX - (mouseX - translateX) * delta;
      translateY = mouseY - (mouseY - translateY) * delta;
      
      scale *= delta;
      scale = Math.max(0.1, Math.min(scale, 10));
      
      updateTransform();
    });
    
    function updateTransform() {
      if (svg) {
        svg.style.transform = `translate(${translateX}px, ${translateY}px) scale(${scale})`;
        svg.style.transformOrigin = '0 0';
        document.getElementById('zoom-level').textContent = 'Zoom: ' + Math.round(scale * 100) + '%';
      }
    }
    
    window.zoomIn = function() {
      scale *= 1.2;
      scale = Math.min(scale, 10);
      updateTransform();
    };
    
    window.zoomOut = function() {
      scale *= 0.8;
      scale = Math.max(scale, 0.1);
      updateTransform();
    };
    
    window.resetView = function() {
      scale = 1;
      translateX = 0;
      translateY = 0;
      updateTransform();
    };
    
    window.togglePanMode = function() {
      panEnabled = !panEnabled;
      var btn = document.getElementById('pan-toggle');
      if (panEnabled) {
        btn.textContent = '🔒 Lock Pan';
        container.style.cursor = 'grab';
      } else {
        btn.textContent = '🔓 Enable Pan';
        container.style.cursor = 'default';
      }
    };
  })();
  
  updateResponseCount();
</script>


```

## Instructions for Users

### How to Use This System

1. **Click on any shape** in the diagram to open the survey panel
2. **Fill out the survey** with your observations
3. **Enter the password** (ask your administrator)
4. **Submit** - your response is saved locally in your browser
5. **Download CSV** regularly and commit to your GitHub repository
6. **Return later** - the form will pre-fill with your previous answers

### For Template Users

When you copy this template:
1. Change the `SURVEY_PASSWORD` in the R setup chunk
2. Replace `DIAGRAM_FILE` with your SVG filename
3. Add survey links to your shapes (see QUICK_REFERENCE.md)
4. Customize the survey questions as needed
